visual_features.overall_style: Modern, industrial, and minimal. Dark theme with a cinematic hero image and a strong, mechanical brand presence. The logo uses an industrial stencil-like display font in a saturated yellow, contrasted against a charcoal background, giving a rugged but premium manufacturing feel. Navigation and content are clean, flat, and typography-led with no ornamental chrome.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Hierarchy is dominated by three layers: (1) The fixed dark header with logo and navigation; (2) A large, high-impact hero image of the CNC machine; (3) Secondary utility (floating button) in the bottom-right. The eye is first drawn to the bright yellow logo on the dark header, then moves horizontally across the navigation, and finally drops to the large central image. Use of color (yellow vs white vs dark gray), size (large hero vs smaller header), and contrast (light-on-dark) all reinforce this hierarchy.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Generous whitespace around the hero image and between the header and content. The hero image is centered with wide left/right margins on the dark background, creating a framed, gallery-like presentation. Navigation items are well spaced with clear separation between each menu item. The design feels spacious rather than crowded, with a clear emphasis on a single strong visual at a time.
unique_elements: Industrial stencil-style yellow logo with strong mechanical character
Dark full-width header seamlessly blending into a dark page background (continuous dark band)
Large, cinematic CNC machine hero photograph framed by dark negative space
Minimal, text-only top navigation with uppercase labels and wide letter-spacing
Bottom-right floating utility/action button with a white square container and a green keyhole icon, standing out strongly against the dark background

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Likely a centered fixed-width grid (approximately 1140–1200px max-width) on a full-bleed dark background, conceptually compatible with a 12-column grid with wide outer gutters.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Full-width dark shell with a fixed-height horizontal header and a centered content column. The hero is a large full-width (within content area) image section; utilities float above content (bottom-right button). Overall pattern is a classic top navigation + hero layout.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: From what is visible: (1) Persistent top navigation (logo left, menu center/right, language selector right); (2) Hero content section with a single large image; (3) Bottom-right floating utility (likely chat/support or privacy). Sections appear stacked vertically with clear separation and strong visual breaks between header and main content.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Left alignment for logo; center/right-aligned horizontal navigation along the same baseline; hero image centered within the page with symmetric left/right margins creating a balanced, centered composition. Text in the nav is horizontally aligned, evenly spaced, and visually centered vertically within the header bar.
responsive_hints: Top navigation uses horizontal text links; on smaller screens this likely collapses into a hamburger menu or stacked menu, as current pattern would not fit narrower viewports.
The hero image maintains a fixed aspect ratio and is horizontally centered, suggesting it will scale down proportionally for tablets and mobile while preserving margins.
Floating bottom-right button is independent of content and will likely maintain its position across breakpoints using fixed positioning.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow: a full-width dark header containing logo and navigation at the top, followed by a large, central hero image block. The hero image is the only visible content in the main area, suggesting subsequent sections would continue the vertical stacking pattern, possibly alternating between full-width visuals and multi-column text or product information. Within the header, elements are arranged horizontally: logo on the far left, then a row of navigation items, then a language selector with a flag icon aligned to the right.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: Top header occupies roughly 10–15% of viewport height with dense yet readable spacing. Below, the hero image occupies the majority of the visible viewport height, framed by sizable top and side margins on the dark background. There is generous lateral whitespace around the hero, giving it about 70–80% of the content width while leaving 10–15% dark margin on each side. The floating button is small, consuming minimal space, but positioned with enough offset from edges (~24–32px) to feel deliberate rather than cramped.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Spacious, low-density layout. The visible design is focused on a single key visual (the CNC machine image) and a minimal navigation bar. Text elements are few and well spaced. There are large dark areas providing breathing room around the central image and at the edges, supporting a premium, focused, product-centric feel.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: The visual flow follows a classic F/Z-pattern: the eye starts at the bright yellow logo in the top-left, scans horizontally across the navigation items (forming the top bar of the Z), then drops diagonally down to the center where the large hero image sits, and finally scans horizontally across the image details. The floating bottom-right button acts as a secondary attractor at the end of this path, drawing attention to support or privacy features after the primary content has been absorbed.

ui_patterns.visual_description: The visible floating button is a small square or slightly rectangular element with relatively soft rounded corners (~10–12px radius). It has a pure white background on the dark page, making it highly contrasted. Inside is a centered green icon (keyhole shape), likely vector/SVG, with no accompanying text. No visible shadow from this angle, but a subtle elevation or drop shadow is likely used on hover to reinforce clickability. Overall: flat, minimalist, high-contrast, with emphasis on icon clarity.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Typically implemented as a fixed-position . For standard CTAs elsewhere on the site (not visible here), a consistent style would be a rectangular button with 4–6px border-radius, solid fill in the accent or primary color (yellow or green) and uppercase label text.

ui_patterns.visual_description: No explicit cards are visible, but the hero image behaves like a large card: clean edges, no visible border, and separation via surrounding dark background. Extrapolating from this, cards are likely flat rectangles with 4–6px corner radius, subtle background (e.g., #212121 or #262626 on the dark theme) and perhaps a very soft shadow or 1px border in a low-contrast gray (#333–#3A3A) to delineate them. Internal padding would be generous (24–32px) with clear vertical stacking of title, meta info, and actions.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: A standard card structure would be <article class='card'> containing optional <figure> for images, <header> for titles, <div class='card-body'> for text, and optional action row at the bottom. For product cards: image-first with text underneath, possibly using a flex or grid layout within the card.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Forms are not directly visible, but consistent with the visual language they would use full-width inputs with dark backgrounds (#202020–#242424), 1px lighter borders (#3A3A3A), and subtle 4px corner radius. Label text likely sits above inputs, left-aligned, in a small uppercase or semi-uppercase style using light gray (#B3B3B3). Focus states would intensify the border or apply accent color (green or yellow) with a mild glow or 1–2px outline. Error messages would be in red (#E53935) with small-sized text, aligned under the field.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Forms would follow a stacked layout: <form> with <div class='form-group'> wrappers, each containing <label> above a block-level <input> or <textarea>. For multi-column desktop layouts, groups could be placed in a CSS grid (2 columns) that collapses to single-column on mobile. Validation feedback would be placed in a <small class='error-text'> beneath the input.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Top navigation is a horizontal bar aligned across the top on a dark background. Logo on the left in bright yellow display font; navigation items are uppercase, likely in a light sans-serif, white or light gray (#F5F5F5), evenly spaced with sizeable horizontal gaps (~32–40px) and no visible borders. Some items have dropdown indicators (small downward chevron after 'CNC MILLS' and 'ABOUT US', and language selector), suggesting hoverable menus. Active or hovered states likely change text color (to yellow) or add an understated underline or bottom border. Overall, very flat and minimal, relying on typography rather than heavy buttons.

ui_patterns.visual_description: List patterns are not visible, but likely follow a minimal, industrial style. Items would be left-aligned with clear vertical spacing (~12–16px) between rows, light gray text on dark background, and subtle separators using either low-contrast 1px dividers (#2A2A2A) or just whitespace. Where icons or thumbnails appear (e.g., in a portfolio or video list), they would sit to the left with text stacked to the right, creating a 'media object' pattern.

heading.visual_style: Headings and navigation appear to use a bold, geometric or grotesque sans-serif with clean straight strokes and a slightly condensed feel, in uppercase with moderate to wide letter-spacing. The logo itself uses a stencil-like, industrial display face, separate from body headings.

body.visual_style: Body text (inferred) would be a neutral, readable humanist sans-serif complementing the strong headings. It should look technical yet approachable, with open apertures and good legibility on dark backgrounds.

font_families.code: Source Code Pro, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace

spacing_system.component_padding: Most interactive components (buttons, cards, form fields) would use 12–16px vertical and 16–24px horizontal padding (1.5–2x base unit), with inner spacing between text and icons at 8px.
spacing_system.section_margin: Vertical spacing between major sections (e.g., between hero and next section) should be 48–64px, maintaining the spacious, premium feel. The hero image itself is inset from the viewport edges by roughly 40–64px of margin on larger screens.

interaction_hints: Navigation items likely use color change (white to yellow) and/or underline/bottom-border on hover, with a slightly smoother color transition (150–200ms). Dropdown menus appear on hover or click for items marked with a downward chevron.

Buttons (including the floating icon button) likely gain a subtle drop-shadow and a small scale-up (1.03x) or background tint change on hover to indicate interactivity, with fast ease-out transitions.

Hero image may have a subtle parallax or fade-in on scroll, reinforcing the cinematic industrial vibe; other elements could use simple opacity/translate transitions to appear smoothly as the user scrolls.
Language selector and dropdown navs would use basic slide/fade transitions (e.g., fade + translateY(4px) over 150–200ms) to feel responsive but not flashy.

The floating bottom-right button almost certainly has a hover state (slightly darker border, raised effect); clicking might open a modal or side panel with an animated slide-in from the right or bottom.
